subject: [PATCH v5 03/18] userfaultfd: gate must_wait writability check on pte_present()

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch modifies the userfaultfd code to gate the writability check on pte_present() when checking if a fault still requires userspace handling due to write protection (WP). This prevents incorrect results from non-marker swap entries, which can occur during concurrent migration or swap-out. The change ensures that the lockless re-check only inspects present PTE bits when the entry is actually present, preventing potential deadlocks and ensuring correct behavior in such scenarios.
